name: eor-compliance-mcp
description: EOR & Global Hiring Compliance MCP for AI agents — country-specific employer-of-record briefs, misclassification risk analysis, EOR vs entity break-even calculator, termination rules, statutory benefits, visa paths. By Elisabeth Hitz - 3+ yrs selling EOR at Deel, Multiplier.
